plugins.name: coding-guidelines
plugins.description: Behavioral guidelines for clean, surgical, goal-driven coding

plugins.name: git-safety
plugins.description: Prevents Claude from running git write commands (skill + PreToolUse hook)

plugins.name: manual-work-coordination
plugins.description: Stop cleanly when the user takes over a task by hand; don't redo, override, or re-verify their manual work

plugins.name: docs-sync
plugins.description: Reminds you to update relevant documentation after code and non-code changes (skill + Stop hook)
